description_long: This object depicts a university campus block with multiple interconnected buildings, green lawns, and tree-lined pathways. The structures are arranged around open courtyards and sports fields, with a mix of rectangular and L-shaped footprints. The rooftops are mostly flat or gently sloped, and the buildings are constructed from light-colored materials, likely concrete or stone, with some red-tiled roofs visible. The campus is bordered by a main road and surrounded by residential and urban infrastructure. Landscaping features such as lawns, trees, and pathways are prominent, creating a collegiate atmosphere.
description: A university campus block with multiple light-colored buildings, green lawns, and tree-lined pathways, bordered by a main road and urban surroundings.
description_view_0: Aerial view showing the full campus layout, including buildings, lawns, and adjacent roads.
description_view_1: Side profile view highlighting the low-rise nature of the buildings and the flatness of the campus.
description_view_2: Oblique underside view, mostly showing the shadowed base and the silhouette of the structures.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the arrangement of buildings around green spaces and the proximity to the main road.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, multi-door entrance with glass and metal framing, rectangular shape, and minimal decorative elements, flanked by landscaped pathways.
